articles.author: Rebecca Bellan
articles.title: DuckDuckGo installs are up 30% as users reject being ‘force-fed’ Google’s AI Search - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google overhauled Search at I/O 2026, replacing blue links with AI agents. The backlash has been swift. DuckDuckGo app installs spiked 30% as users seek a way out.
articles.content:
Last week, after Google announced its huge overhaul to Search, I overheard a woman on the phone saying she was switching to DuckDuckGo because you can opt out of using AI.
Google just isnt Google an… [+3309 chars]
